Hero.description: All laboratory, tissue, genetic, and routine medical tests — delivered with accuracy across 7 branches in Jordan.

QuickFeatures.f1_desc: Perform precise chemical and biological analyses for reliable results.
QuickFeatures.f2_desc: Accurately examine and process samples to ensure consistent results.
QuickFeatures.f3_desc: Explore genetic markers with advanced lab techniques.

About.subtitle: About Our Laboratory
About.desc: We are dedicated to delivering precise, reliable, and innovative laboratory solutions. For years, we have supported healthcare professionals by combining expertise, advanced technology, and rigorous quality standards.
About.point1: Skilled scientists and technicians with years of experience.
About.point3: Timely reports to keep your health on track.

Services.subtitle: Our Lab Expertise
Services.s1_desc: Perform accurate testing and analysis of clinical samples to support disease detection.
Services.s2_desc: Detect and identify microorganisms using advanced techniques to ensure safety.
Services.s3_desc: Examine tissues and cells using microscopic techniques to support diagnostics.
Services.s4_desc: Apply molecular tools to advance diagnostics, therapeutics, and scientific discovery.

Workflow.step1_desc: We carefully collect samples following strict protocols to maintain quality and prevent contamination.
Workflow.step2_desc: Using advanced instruments, our team performs precise tests on every sample.
Workflow.step3_desc: Accurate and fast results delivered directly to your portal or via WhatsApp.

Branches.subtitle: Our Locations
Branches.description: We are located near you in multiple locations to ensure your comfort

Footer.about_desc: PMLab is a leading medical laboratory in Jordan, providing precision diagnostic services with state-of-the-art technology and expert care.
Footer.copyright: © {year} Precision Medical Lab (PMLab). All rights reserved.

Auth.signup_subtitle: Join PMLab to manage your health reports

Booking.title: Book Your Lab Test
Booking.subtitle: Easy and fast appointment scheduling
Booking.success_desc: Your appointment has been scheduled. We will contact you shortly.
